LanguageData.USAC_CombatSupplyDrop.label: combat supply drop
LanguageData.USAC_CombatSupplyDrop.description: Request a combat resupply package for immediate frontline use.
LanguageData.USAC_LogisticSupplyDrop.label: logistic supply drop
LanguageData.USAC_LogisticSupplyDrop.description: Request mixed logistical supplies for sustained operations.
LanguageData.USAC_CommandSupplyDrop.label: command supply drop
LanguageData.USAC_CommandSupplyDrop.description: Request high-value command supplies including advanced components and USAC bonds.
LanguageData.USAC_CallRifleSquad.label: call rifle squad
LanguageData.USAC_CallRifleSquad.description: Call a 4 men rifle squad to support combat operations.
LanguageData.USAC_CallHeavyTeam.label: call heavy team
LanguageData.USAC_CallHeavyTeam.description: Call a 4 men heavy fireteam equipped for entrenched targets.
LanguageData.USAC_CallEliteDetachment.label: call elite detachment
LanguageData.USAC_CallEliteDetachment.description: Call a 4 men elite detachment for decisive battlefield intervention.
LanguageData.USAC_CallTransportShuttle.label: call transport shuttle
LanguageData.USAC_CallTransportShuttle.description: Call a shuttle for strategic transport of personnel, cargo, and animals.
LanguageData.USAC_Call_CAS.label: close air strafing
LanguageData.USAC_Call_CAS.description: Request close air support from the nearest USAC aerial carrier, including 20mm explosive chaingun strafing and four Hydra rocket strike.
LanguageData.USAC_Call_CAB.label: close air bombard
LanguageData.USAC_Call_CAB.description: Request close air support from the nearest USAC aerial carrier; an attack jet will drop one anti-fortification guided bomb on the designated location.
LanguageData.USAC_CallOrbitalStrike.label: call orbital strike
LanguageData.USAC_CallOrbitalStrike.description: Call a precision orbital strike on a designated target area.
